description: Purple round neck top made of blended cotton, has long raglan sleeves with elasticated cuffs and an elasticated hem Fit Regular Wash care Machine wash with similar colours Do not bleach Do not dry in direct sunlight Use warm iron if required arrow woman caters to every fashionista. This top from arrow is a a tried-and-true favourite with a slouchy silhouette that flatters your curves. Pair it with pencil skirts or form-fitting denims and kitten heels. Model statistics The product is a size M on a model of height 5.8" and chest 33"
